title: IIM Trichy Library Information Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Tiruchirappalli (IIM Trichy) Library Information Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 28 May 2026 on the official website of IIM Trichy. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Trichy Library Information Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age Relaxation: As per Government of India norms for PwBD and Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline with at least second class (50% marks) and Post-graduate degree in Library and Information Science with at least a second class (50% marks) from a reputed University / Institute. At least three years' post-qualification working experience in handling library work in a reputed research/educational institute and proficiency in computer applications in the management of an RFID-based modern library in an automated, integrated and networked environment.
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline (10+2+3) with at least second class (50% marks). Post-graduate degree in Library and Information Science with at least a second class (50% marks) from a reputed University / Institute. At least three years' post-qualification working experience in handling library work in a reputed research/educational institute and proficiency in computer applications in the management of an RFID-based modern library in an automated, integrated and networked environment.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs 30,000/- per month.

selection_process: Screening of online applications Written Test / Skill Test / Trade Test / Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Trichy Library Information Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Trichy to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Trichy Library Information Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIM Trichy Library Information Assistant post is 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any discipline with at least 50% marks and possess a Post-graduate degree in Library and Information Science with at least 50% marks from a reputed institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Library Information Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Library Information Assistant post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this contract position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Library Information Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Library Information Assistant post on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the required work experience for the Library Information Assistant role?
faq.answer: A minimum of three years of post-qualification working experience in library work at a reputed research/educational institute is required.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key selection stages for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of online applications, followed by a Written Test / Skill Test / Trade Test / Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
